subcodes.first_line: Praised be unto God Who hath caused to be made manifest that which was hidden for an eternity of eternities and  concealed from both outer and inner  eyes
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر ما کان مکنونا فی ازل الازال و مستورا عن العیون و الابصار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @soul; spirit after death
